popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from Peerage of Scotland, v 1 p 456

Constable, Viscount of Dunbar.  XII.  Sir John Constable of Halsham, who died 1447.  He married Margaret, daughter and coheiress of Sir Thomas Umfraville, kn …

zh.Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾坎布利其
zh.Burton Constable, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾伯頓 康斯特勃
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Constable III於大約1385年出生在英國越可爾哈爾善姆時，他的父親Sir William Constable28歲，母親Elizabeth Metham25歲。他於1423年4月與Margaret Umfraville結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1435年在英國越可爾被列為high sheriff。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾坎布利其
zh-hans.Burton Constable, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾伯頓 康斯特勃
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Constable III于大约1385年出生在英国越可爾哈爾善姆时，他的父亲Sir William Constable28岁，母亲Elizabeth Metham25岁。他于1423年4月与Margaret Umfraville结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1435年在英国越可爾被列为high sheriff。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Constable III was born about 1385, in Halsham, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Constable, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Metham, was 25. He married Margaret Umfraville in April 1423. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. In 1435, at the age of 51, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Yorkshire, England. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Constable III est né environ 1385, à Halsham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Constable, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Metham, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Umfraville en avril 1423. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. En 1435, à l’âge de 51 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Constable III um 1385 in Halsham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Constable 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Metham 25. Er hat im April 1423 Margaret Umfraville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. 1435, als er 51 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff in Yorkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Constable III è nato il circa 1385 nel Halsham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Constable, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Metham, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Umfraville nel aprile 1423. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Nel 1435, all'età di 51 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Yorkshire, England. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Halsham, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアハルシャム
ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England: イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジ
ja.Burton Constable, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアブルトン コンスタブル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Constable IIIが約1385年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハルシャムで生まれた時，父Sir William Constableは28歳，母Elizabeth Methamは25歳であった。1423年4月にMargaret Umfravilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1435年，51歳の時，イギリスヨークシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Constable III(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 요르크실르 할샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Constable(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Metham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1423년 4월 Margaret Umfraville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1435년, 51세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 요르크실르에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Constable III nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Constable, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Metham, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Umfraville em abril de 1423. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Em 1435, com 51 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Constable III родился около 1385 г. в местности холшам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Constable было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Metham, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Umfraville апрель 1423 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1435 году, в возрасте 51 год,  он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности еркшир, Англия. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Constable III nació aproximadamente 1385, en Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Constable, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Metham, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Umfraville en abril de 1423. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. En 1435, a la edad de 51 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió en su pueblo.
